en_title: Nintendo Acknowledges Employee Data at Risk After Third-Party Service Breach
cn_title: 任天堂承认第三方服务泄露员工数据
subtitle: 虚惊一场
opus_summary: 任天堂承认第三方调查服务泄露员工数据，遭勒索200万美元(约合人民币1352万元)赎金。公司称系统未受影响，泄露为旧调查，不涉开发机密且未回应。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has acknowledged a data breach that includes employee information, following a claim that the company's own systems had been hacked.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂承认了一起涉及员工信息的数据泄露事件，此前有说法称该公司自身系统曾遭黑客入侵。

paragraphs.en: In a statement, Nintendo said its own servers had not been impacted, but accepted that "an issue" had occurred with TinyPulse, a third-party service it used for employee surveys.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂在一份声明中表示，其自身服务器并未受到影响，但承认其用于员工调查的第三方服务TinyPulse出现了「一个问题」。

paragraphs.en: Posts on social media show self-styled "extortion as a service" group ShadowByt3$ demanding a $2 million ransom in a bid to stop it leaking the names, email, and bank records of Nintendo employees, as well as survey data, progress plans and details of the company's top-performing staff.
paragraphs.cn: 社交媒体上的帖子显示，自称为「勒索即服务」的组织ShadowByt3$索要200万美元(约合人民币1352万元)赎金，以阻止其泄露任天堂员工的姓名、邮箱和银行记录，以及调查数据、进度计划和公司优秀员工的详细信息。

paragraphs.en: "Nintendo's systems have not been compromised, and no personal customer or financial data has been accessed," a Nintendo spokesperson said in a statement to Nintendo Life . "The data involved is limited to internal survey content comprising a small subset of our employees, and most of the information dates back several years."
paragraphs.cn: 「任天堂的系统并未被攻破，没有任何客户个人数据或财务数据被访问，」任天堂发言人在给Nintendo Life的一份声明中表示，「涉及的数据仅限于内部调查内容，仅涉及一小部分员工，且大部分信息可追溯到数年前。」

paragraphs.en: In other words, this situation will not result in the leak of development details and assets — as occurred previously in the high-profile 2020 Nintendo "Gigaleak" or the subsequent "Teraleak" of data extracted from the servers of Pokémon developer GameFreak.
paragraphs.cn: 换句话说，此次事件不会导致开发细节和资产泄露——这与先前2020年任天堂高调发生的「Gigaleak」事件或随后从《宝可梦》开发商GameFreak服务器中提取数据的「Teraleak」事件不同。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo made no suggestion it was engaging with the extortion group, and indeed, suggested it expected the survey data to be posted online.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂并未表示正在与勒索组织接触，事实上，它暗示预计调查数据将被发布到网上。

paragraphs.en: "We appreciate our employees' willingness to share their perspectives, take all feedback seriously, and take action when needed," Nintendo concluded. "We are working with the service provider to address the issue."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们感谢员工愿意分享他们的观点，我们认真对待所有反馈，并在需要时采取行动，」任天堂总结道，「我们正与服务提供商合作解决这一问题。」

paragraphs.en: Exactly what could be revealed within Nintendo employee feedback remains to be seen, though Nintendo of America has previously been criticised by some staff for its handling of temporary worker contracts — something IGN previously investigated .
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂员工反馈中究竟会揭示什么，仍有待观察，不过任天堂美国此前曾因临时工合同处理问题受到部分员工批评——IGN此前曾对此进行过调查。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。您可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。

manual_approved_issues.detail: translation still contains raw currency symbol/code; convert it to Chinese currency text plus CNY
